summary: M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-RECOVERY-001 is CLOSED after PR #215 passed CI, merged, and origin/main contains the accepted second M7 systemic interaction recovery task graph. The next dependency-ready task is M7-CORE-ACTION-LOOP-UX-001.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.

decisions.decision: Mark M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-RECOVERY-001 CLOSED only after PR #215 passed CI and entered origin/main.
Start M7-CORE-ACTION-LOOP-UX-001 next to repair the phase-driven core action loop, obligation entry, and appointment feedback path.
M7 content lock remains BLOCKED with content_lock_accepted=false until systemic interaction recovery validation passes and product owner reconsiders.

risks.summary: Formal content lock remains blocked until the newly planned recovery chain is implemented and validated.

requested_action: Synchronize main, close this planning task, then start M7-CORE-ACTION-LOOP-UX-001.
